tasks.completion_summary: Task already complete - all 13 spec files exist from previous loop session covering IHistoryStore, ICompletionProvider, SQLite schema, autosuggestions, plugin architecture, config format, keybindings, FlagSpecs extraction, and implementation phases.

Created docs/specs/architecture-overview.md with component diagram showing InteractiveShell, LineEditor, BashTranspiler, PwshWorker, and plugin system. Added data flow diagrams for Tab, Up/Down, Right/End keys, typing, and Enter. Includes component responsibilities table and references to existing specs.

Created docs/specs/lineeditor-vt100-design.md documenting VT100 escape sequences, rendering strategy, Unicode/wide character handling approach, platform compatibility (Windows Console API fallback), key-by-key input loop, multi-line input detection, kill ring design, and tab completion integration.

Created docs/specs/ctrlr-ui.md with comprehensive Ctrl-R full-screen search UI specification including ASCII mockup, fuzzy matching algorithm (exact/prefix/substring/subsequence), sort order scoring (CWD > recency > frequency), VT100 rendering strategy (alternate screen buffer), keybinding table, CWD filter toggle, exit code indicators, and IHistoryStore integration.

Verified all sequence-awareness design already documented across existing specs: sqlite-history-schema.md (sequences table, command_sequences view), history-store-interface.md (SequenceSuggestion record, GetSequenceSuggestionsAsync method, scoring factors), completion-providers.md (SequenceCompletionProvider spec), config-format.md (enable_sequence_suggestions setting), shell-implementation-phases.md (P6 phase plan). No new document needed.

Created docs/specs/cwd-awareness.md consolidating CWD-aware history design. Filled gap: parent directory matching (not documented before) now specified with hierarchy matching algorithm, SQL implementation, scoring tiers (exact CWD > parent > global > recency), and edge cases. Also references all existing CWD-related docs.

Created docs/specs/atuin-adapter.md with complete Atuin plugin adapter design. Covers Atuin SQLite schema (table structure, columns, indexes), column mapping to HistoryEntry (duration ns->ms conversion, timestamp parsing, deleted_at filtering), read-only adapter design (RecordAsync throws, ReadOnly mode, no persistent connection), SearchAsync implementation with all filters, GetSequenceSuggestionsAsync with adjacent-row queries and CWD-boosted scoring, merge strategy (parallel queries, dedup by command text, timestamp sort), auto-detection of DB path (XDG_DATA_HOME, platform fallbacks), config.toml support, and error handling (locked DB retry, corrupted DB handling).

Implemented PS1 prompt customization and LineEditor wiring. Added BuildPromptAsync to check $env:PS1 from worker, ExpandPS1 for bash escape sequences (\u, \h, \w, \W, \$, \d, \t, \T, \@, \n, \s, \[\]), and BuildBuiltinPrompt for fallback. Wired LineEditor into ReadInputAsync with history file (.psbash_history) and TabCompleter delegation. All 612 tests pass (16 pre-existing failures in AgentPatternEndToEndTests unrelated to changes).

Updated parser-grammar.md with Special Bash Variables section documenting SECONDS, PPID, BASH_VERSION mappings and updated SimpleVarSub to include these variables. Updated emitter-strategy.md with sed backreference handling documentation and strict-mode guards ($global:__BashErrexit) for set -e. Verified shopt, type -a/-p, head -c, and other v0.8.x features already documented in runtime-functions.md. Command count (76) and test badge (857) verified as correct.
